_meta.gameVersion: ER base game (as of capture date)
_meta.scope: Batch 2 — Pre-Margit accessible talismans across Limgrave, Weeping Peninsula, and Dragonbarrow (via Bestial Sanctum portal)
_meta.source: Fextralife /Talismans master list + per-talisman pages, extracted 2026-04-19

schema_notes.effectCategory: stat_bonus | damage_mult | damage_negation | survival | utility | special | conditional
schema_notes.flagged: true if the talisman has conditional pre-Margit access (NPC invasion trigger, difficult-traversal pickup, or skill-gated challenge rather than boss-gated)
schema_notes.upgradedVersions: many talismans have +1/+2/+3 variants found later in the game (Raya Lucaria+, Altus+, SotE DLC); the pre-Margit entries are the base tier
schema_notes.stackingRule: 'none' = stacks cleanly with everything; other values describe specific conflicts or upgrade-path replacements

talismans.name: Axe Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Increases Charge Attack damage by 10%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Underground cellar chest beneath Mistwood Ruins, Limgrave
talismans.notes: Does not affect skills with 'charge' in the name (Charge Forth, Prelate's Charge), bow projectiles, Frozen Needle. Also buffs charged attacks under War Cry / Barbaric Roar / Braggart's Roar.

talismans.name: Haligdrake Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Reduces Holy Damage taken by 13% (4% in PvP)
talismans.stackingRule: upgrade path: Haligdrake +1 (17%), +2 (20%), +3 via Golden Braid in SotE
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Corpse in beach cave south of Stranded Graveyard / below Seaside Ruins
prerequisites: Glide down on Torrent via windstream
talismans.notes: Multiplicative stacking with other defense sources = diminishing returns.

talismans.name: Arrow's Reach Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Increases the effective range of bows (and some spells) by 65%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Chest inside tower by Stormhill Evergaol, Stormhill/Limgrave
talismans.notes: Also affects Crossbows, Ballistas, Greatbows, and ranged sorcery/incant (Rock Sling, Bestial Sling, Rain of Arrows, etc.)

talismans.name: Lance Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Increases damage of attacks while on horseback by 15%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Corpse on fallen golem part, NE Stormhill (near Deathtouched Catacombs / Saintsbridge)
talismans.notes: Does not affect magic spells, bow attacks, or consumables. Only while mounted on Torrent.

talismans.name: Flamedrake Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Reduces Fire Damage taken by 13% (4% in PvP)
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Beastman of Farum Azula (Groveside Cave boss)
talismans.notes: Does not reduce damage from lava sources.

talismans.name: Blue Dancer Charm
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises Physical Damage with lower Equip Load. Max 1.15x at near-zero weight; 1.135x at 8 weight; 1.09x at 16; 1.0375x at 20; no effect at 30+
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Guardian Golem (Highroad Cave boss)
talismans.notes: Only boosts physical scaling damage (not base physical, not non-physical types). Works with bows and physical sorceries/incants.

talismans.name: Roar Medallion
talismans.effectPrecise: Increases damage of roars and breath attacks by 15%. War Cry armament buffs: +15% on heavy attacks only. Dragon Communion: +10% PvE / +5% PvP. Other incants (Howl of Shabriri, Crucible Breath): +15%
talismans.stackingRule: stacks with Highland Axe for additional +15% on compatible skills
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Stonedigger Troll (Limgrave Tunnels end boss)
talismans.notes: Does NOT work with Bayle's Tyranny, Grafted Dragon, Igon's Greatbow.

talismans.name: Assassin's Crimson Dagger
talismans.effectPrecise: Critical attacks restore 10% + 85 HP
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Black Knife Assassin (Deathtouched Catacombs boss)
talismans.notes: Can double-proc with colossal/dagger/great katana crits on large enemies. Does not work with whips or bow headshots.

talismans.name: Erdtree's Favor
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises max HP by 3%, Stamina by 7%, Equip Load by 5%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Altar at end of hidden drop-down in Fringefolk Hero's Grave
prerequisites: 2 Stonesword Keys on double Imp Statue at Stranded Graveyard
talismans.notes: Percentage bonuses stack multiplicatively with other talismans. Generally top-tier survival talisman at every level range.

talismans.name: Green Turtle Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises stamina recovery speed by 17.7% (≈+8 stamina/sec)
talismans.stackingRule: stacks with Great Turtle Shell, Pickled Turtle Neck consumable
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Underground chamber beneath Summonwater Village, Limgrave NE
talismans.notes: Most effective for melee/colossal users with high stamina consumption.

talismans.name: Crimson Amber Medallion
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises max HP by 6%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Nomadic Merchant at Castle Morne Rampart, Weeping Peninsula
talismans.notes: Also available as starting Keepsake. +3 variant weighs 0.6.

talismans.name: Viridian Amber Medallion
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises max Stamina by 11%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Miranda the Blighted Bloom (Tombsward Cave, SE of Fourth Church of Marika)
talismans.notes: Most useful for shield-focused or power-stance builds with heavy stamina consumption.

talismans.name: Spelldrake Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Reduces Magic Damage taken by 13% (4% in PvP)
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Runebear (Earthbore Cave boss)
talismans.notes: Runebear is a tough fight — bring summons. Magic damage reduction is multiplicative.

talismans.name: Twinblade Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Increases damage of final hit in attack chain by 45%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Chest on western tower exterior, Castle Morne (from Behind the Castle SoG)
talismans.notes: Only works on light attack (R1) chains. Best on short-combo weapons (colossal, great spears). Ineffective on actual twinblades (long combos). ~13.6% total damage increase on 3-hit combos.

talismans.name: Ritual Sword Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises attack power by 10% when HP is at 100%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Demi-Human Queen Gilika (Lux Ruins — chest after kill)
talismans.notes: Requires exactly 100% HP (not 99%). Red aura + sound while active. Works with sorceries, incants, skills, bows. Stacks additively with Golden Vow.

talismans.name: Radagon's Scarseal
talismans.effectPrecise: +3 VIG/END/STR/DEX each, but +10% damage taken
talismans.stackingRule: upgrade path: Radagon's Soreseal (+5 same stats, 15% dmg taken penalty) — cannot equip both simultaneously
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Ancient Hero of Zamor (Weeping Evergaol)
talismans.notes: Flat stat bonuses are most impactful early-game. Effective damage-taken increase ranges 0-3.5% weak attacks to 7-8.5% strong attacks (partially offset by Vigor bonus).

talismans.name: Dragoncrest Shield Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Reduces Physical Damage taken by 10% (2% in PvP)
talismans.stackingRule: upgrade path: +1 (13%), +2 (17%), then Dragoncrest Greatshield Talisman (20%) — mutually exclusive with upgrades
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Ledge beneath Bestial Sanctum, accessed via tree-root descent on western cliff
prerequisites: Bestial Sanctum portal access from Third Church of Marika
talismans.notes: Base variant requires difficult platforming. Greatshield variant is easier to obtain and strictly superior — prioritize that later in game.

talismans.name: Bull-Goat's Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises poise by 33% (reduces incoming poise damage by 25%)
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: End of Giant Bear patrol route, Dragonbarrow Cave
talismans.notes: Stacks multiplicatively with armor poise. Most effective with heavy armor (76+ base poise recommended to hit 101 stagger-immunity threshold).

talismans.name: Hammer Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Increases Stamina damage against blocking enemies by 40%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Recusant Henricus (NPC invader near Warmaster's Shack / NE of Stormhill Shack)
talismans.flagReason: Pre-Margit accessible BUT requires the Recusant Henricus invasion to trigger. Will NOT spawn if the player has spoken to Tanith at Volcano Manor and agreed to join — irreversible lockout condition.
talismans.notes: Only works against shield blocks, not general stance-breaking. Buffed from +20% to +40% in Patch 1.07.

talismans.name: Great-Jar's Arsenal
talismans.effectPrecise: Vastly raises maximum Equip Load by 19%
talismans.stackingRule: does not stack with Arsenal Charm (lower-tier 17% equip load)
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Defeat 3 NPC duelists summoned by Great-Jar in Dragonbarrow, single life required
prerequisites: Bestial Sanctum portal access to Dragonbarrow
skill to defeat 3 phantom invaders without dying
talismans.flagReason: Physically reachable pre-Margit via Bestial Sanctum portal, but the 3 NPC duelists are tuned for mid-game. Skill-gated not boss-gated.
talismans.notes: Post-patch 1.07 armor poise changes reduced necessity. Best attempted once character is stronger.

talismans.name: Arrow's Sting Talisman
talismans.effectPrecise: Raises attack power of Arrows/Bolts by 10%
talismans.acquisitionSpecific: Chest atop tower above Impassable Greatbridge Site of Grace, in front of Redmane Castle
prerequisites: Bestial Sanctum portal access → Dragonbarrow south through Caelid
talismans.flagReason: Reachable pre-Margit via Bestial Sanctum portal route, but traversal passes through high-danger Caelid (basilisks, dogs). Not boss-gated.
talismans.notes: Does NOT boost Loretta's Mastery / Loretta's Greatbow sorceries. Applies to arrow/bolt damage only, not the bow's base AR — more modest damage increases than 10% suggests.
